scripts.generate:stripe-schemas: curl -fsSL --create-dirs -o schemas/stripe-openapi.json https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stripe/openapi/master/openapi/spec3.sdk.json && node scripts/filterStripeSpec.mjs && mkdir -p src/generated && openapi-zod-client schemas/stripe-openapi.filtered.json -o src/generated/stripe-schemas.ts -t node_modules/openapi-zod-client/src/templates/schemas-only.hbs --export-schemas && node scripts/patchGeneratedSchemas.mjs
